message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title orderList表示

actor 配達員

participant "Courieridform.jsp" as Courieridform
participant "OrderListServlet" as OrderListServlet
participant "CourierDAO" as CourierDAO
participant "Courier" as Courier
participant "Session" as Session
participant "OrderDAO" as OrderDAO

participant "Order" as Order
participant "DetailDAO" as DetailDAO
participant "Detail" as Detail
participant "Request" as Request
participant "orderedlist.jsp" as orderedlist

配達員 -> Courieridform : courierID入力
Courieridform -> OrderListServlet : リンク
OrderListServlet -> CourierDAO : findByCourierid()
CourierDAO -> Courier : 生成
CourierDAO --> OrderListServlet : Courier
OrderListServlet -> Courier : Courier
OrderListServlet -> OrderDAO : findAll()
OrderDAO -> DetailDAO : 生成
OrderDAO -> DetailDAO : findByOrderid()
DetailDAO -> Detail : リスト生成
DetailDAO --> OrderDAO : ArrayList<Detail>
OrderDAO -> Order : setDetail\n(ArrayList<Detail>)
OrderDAO --> OrderListServlet : ArrayListr<Order>
OrderListServlet -> Request : setAttribute(ArrayList<Order>)
OrderListServlet -> orderedlist : フォワード
orderedlist -> 配達員 : 表示

@enduml
```
